description: 5-fold XGBoost trained on tabular features, returns OOF and test predictions.

interface.entrypoint: fit_predict(X_train, y_train, X_test, cat_features=None, n_folds=5, is_classification=True, device=None, xgboost_params=None) -> (oof_preds, test_preds, model_list)
interface.input_shapes: X_train: pd.DataFrame, y_train: np.ndarray, X_test: pd.DataFrame
interface.output_shapes: oof_preds: np.ndarray, test_preds: np.ndarray, model_list: list

usage_example: oof, test_preds, models = fit_predict(X_train, y_train, X_test, cat_features=['sex','cp'])
known_pitfalls: Categorical columns must be passed in cat_features and are converted to category dtype inside the method.
Requires enable_categorical=True which is enabled by default inside the method.
XGBoost GPU uses CUDA; unavailable CUDA builds retry safely on CPU.
